description:
Implement `hx-structured-list` (T3 tier) — 2/6 libraries ship this. Key-value data display for detail/summary views (like a description list).

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-structured-list/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-structured-list.ts`, `hx-structured-list.styles.ts`, `hx-structured-list.stories.ts`, `hx-structured-list.test.ts`

**Two components:** `hx-structured-list` (container) + `hx-structured-list-row` (each row with label+value pair)

**`hx-structured-list` props:** `bordered` (boolean), `condensed` (boolean — tighter spacing), `striped` (boolean)

**`hx-structured-list-row` props:** none
**Slots on `hx-structured-list-row`:** `label` (the key/term), default (the value/definition), `actions` (edit button, etc.)

**ARIA:** Use `<dl>` semantics: container is `<dl>`, each row has `<dt>` (label) + `<dd>` (value). Or use `role="term"` + `role="definition"` pattern.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (rendering, bordered, striped), axe-core zero violations, Storybook with user profile + settings panel demos, bundle < 3KB.

Register both in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-structured-list — T3 Structured Data List
